subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-27
subcodes.first_line: The purpose of the divine Manifestations has been the education of holy souls.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود مظاهر مقدسه الهیه تربیت نفوس مقدسه بوده بعضی چنان گمان نمودند که مقصد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @call to action
